resources.name: About x07lang-mcp
resources.text:
Official MCP server for the X07 language.

Primary goal: token-efficient agent coding loops for editing, certification, packaging, and capability-gated runtime workflows.

Safety:
- No network by default.
- File access is sandboxed per tool.
- Certification guidance stays on the public docs surface.

resources.name: Agent playbook (token-efficient)
resources.text:
Preferred agent loop (bounded by design):
1) Discover with x07.search_v1 or x07.doc_v1.
2) For proofs or certificates, read x07://trust/formal-verification before running commands.
3) x07.exec_v1: run x07 with argv/args (use --json=canon + --report-out + --quiet-json when possible).
3b) For dependency closure/integrity: x07.pkg.tree_v1 / x07.pkg.verify_v1 / x07.pkg.check_semver_v1.
4) On failure: x07.context_pack_v1 (x07 agent context) to focus on only the relevant code + diagnostics.
5) Fix via x07.patch_apply_v1 (x07.patchset@0.1.0).
6) Repeat x07.exec_v1.

Certification loop:
- x07 verify --prove --entry <sym>
- x07 trust profile check --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym>
- x07 pkg attest-closure --project x07.json --out arch/trust/dependency_closure.attest.json for networked profiles
- x07 trust certify --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym> --out-dir target/cert

Minimize tokens:
- Use x07.search_v1 for discovery (small hits list).
- Use resources/read or x07.artifact_snippet_v1 only when needed.
- Prefer context packs over dumping files into chat.

resources.name: Formal verification and certification
resources.text: {"schema_version":"x07lang.mcp.resource@0.1.0","pack":"core","docs":["x07/docs/toolchain/formal-verification.md","x07/docs/toolchain/review-trust.md","x07/docs/toolchain/cli.md"],"examples":["x07/docs/examples/verified_core_pure_v1/","x07/docs/examples/trusted_network_service_v1/","x07/docs/examples/certified_network_capsule_v1/"],"commands":["x07 verify --prove --entry <sym>","x07 trust profile check --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym>","x07 trust capsule check --project x07.json --index arch/capsules/index.x07capsule.json","x07 pkg attest-closure --project x07.json --out arch/trust/dependency_closure.attest.json","x07 trust certify --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym> --out-dir target/cert"]}

resources.name: Packaging integrity tooling
resources.text: {"schema_version":"x07lang.mcp.resource@0.1.0","pack":"pkg","docs":["x07/docs/guides/packaging-integrity.md","x07/docs/guides/offline.md"],"commands":["x07 pkg verify NAME[@VERSION]","x07 pkg check-semver --old <dir> --new <dir>","x07 pkg tree --project x07.json","x07 pkg lock --project x07.json --check --offline","x07 run --project x07.json --offline --input <case.bin>"]}
